description: Registry of all constitutional violation codes for automated governance gate validation

violation_categories.CONTEXT: Context vault and token management violations
violation_categories.SOVEREIGNTY: Data sovereignty and vendor boundary violations

ERR-HEADER-001.description: Missing mandatory file header with absolute Windows-style path
ERR-HEADER-001.example_violation: File has no header or uses relative path
ERR-HEADER-001.remediation: Add header as first line of file with Windows-style absolute path using forward slashes (C:/Users/...)

ERR-PATH-001.description: Hardcoded or relative paths instead of pathlib.Path with Windows-style absolute paths
ERR-PATH-001.remediation: Replace all path strings with pathlib.Path objects using Windows-style absolute paths

ERR-CONTEXT-001.description: Inline data exceeding 8,192 tokens without using Context Vault
ERR-CONTEXT-001.detection_method: Token count estimation on string literals and embedded data
ERR-CONTEXT-001.remediation: Move large data to context_vault/ directory and reference via path

ERR-CONTEXT-002.description: Context vault file path referenced but file does not exist
ERR-CONTEXT-002.detection_method: Path existence check for context_vault_path values
ERR-CONTEXT-002.example_fix: Ensure file exists before referencing, or remove context_vault_path field
ERR-CONTEXT-002.remediation: Create the referenced file or update path to existing file

ERR-CONTEXT-003.description: Context vault file exceeds recommended 100MB size
ERR-CONTEXT-003.detection_method: File size check on context_vault/ files
ERR-CONTEXT-003.example_fix: Split file into smaller chunks or optimize data structure
ERR-CONTEXT-003.remediation: Optimize file size through compression or chunking

ERR-CONTEXT-004.description: Invalid regex pattern in symbolic search query
ERR-CONTEXT-004.example_fix: pattern = r'\[.*?\]'  # Valid regex with raw string
ERR-CONTEXT-004.remediation: Fix regex syntax or use simple string search

ERR-CONTEXT-005.description: Direct file load of vault content instead of symbolic search
ERR-CONTEXT-005.remediation: Use context_handler.py symbolic search methods instead of direct file reads

ERR-ENTRYPOINT-001.detection_method: Check for epos_doctor import and call in files with if __name__ == '__main__'
ERR-ENTRYPOINT-001.remediation: Add epos_doctor.py health check before main execution

ERR-ENTRYPOINT-002.description: Missing Python version validation in entrypoint
ERR-ENTRYPOINT-002.detection_method: Check for sys.version_info validation in entrypoint files
ERR-ENTRYPOINT-002.example_violation: No version check in file with __name__ == '__main__'
ERR-ENTRYPOINT-002.remediation: Add Python version check at top of entrypoint files

ERR-LOGGING-001.remediation: Separate logging from execution; verify work done before reporting success

ERR-LOGGING-002.example_fix:
log_path.write_text(log_data)
assert log_path.exists(), 'Log file not created'
ERR-LOGGING-002.remediation: Add assertion or validation after file write operations

ERR-CONFIG-001.detection_method: Check for load_dotenv import and call in entrypoint files
ERR-CONFIG-001.example_violation: No load_dotenv() call before os.getenv() usage
ERR-CONFIG-001.remediation: Add dotenv import and load call at top of entrypoint

ERR-CONFIG-002.remediation: Provide default value and validate existence

ERR-SOVEREIGNTY-001.example_fix: Add local Ollama fallback or make external calls explicit vendor boundaries
ERR-SOVEREIGNTY-001.remediation: Ensure local-first operation with vendor services as optional extensions

ERR-SOVEREIGNTY-002.detection_method: Check for write operations to engine/ or constitutional files
ERR-SOVEREIGNTY-002.example_fix: Write to vendor sandbox directory instead
ERR-SOVEREIGNTY-002.remediation: Vendor code must operate within designated sandbox boundaries

ERR-DESTRUCTIVE-001.remediation: Add confirmation prompt and audit logging for destructive operations

critical.description: Immediate rejection, blocks execution, must be fixed before promotion

high.description: Strong recommendation to fix, generates warning, allowed with documentation

medium.description: Best practice violation, tracked but not blocking

actions.below_critical: Enter STASIS mode per Article XI

structure.file_info: Rejected file path and submission time
structure.detailed_explanation: For each violation: code, severity, constitutional reference, example fix
structure.resubmission_instructions: How to fix and resubmit to governance gate

ERR-HEADER-001.method: Prepend standard header with detected filename

ERR-ENTRYPOINT-002.method: Insert Python version check after imports

version_history.changes: Initial violation code registry aligned with EPOS_CONSTITUTION_v3.1.md
version_history.author: AI Engineering Team
